reviews.review_description:
First, thank you developers for this VR tennis, it is a good start. 
My suggestions to improve the gameplay 
Need training mode for forehand,  backhand,  overhead service,  
( backhand and overhead service are not easy )
Hitting targets mode if possible,  because it is fun .
The background environment is too simple and basic.  The moving clouds around the tennis court are useless to the gameplay.  
The TV screen on top of the net is  not good placement,  please places on the side or behind the player.  Are there option to turn off the voice , because I just have to look at the TV screen , also the TV screen should show more useful information , ( eg, ball IN or OUT information ,  ) . Player name .  
Please continue to improve the game , game development is fun but it is not easy too.

reviews.review_title: I'm the developer, love what I'm doing!
reviews.review_description:
This is really in the early stage and the pricing is a place holder.

There is no need to buy at the price for now. We are giving out free keys for early adopters.

This is really in the early stage and the pricing is a place holder.

There is no need to buy at the price for now. We are giving out free keys for early adopters.

Just join our discord server https://tele.tennis/discord for a free key :)

I like the way the controller vibrates when you hit the ball - very authentic. I would love to have a training mode to focus on aspects of my gameplay as I am currently too bad at the game to play a decent match. Sure the environment will improve as this is still very early beta. I see a lot of potential here.

reviews.review_title: Has potential but needs a lot of work.
reviews.review_description: This game has a lot of potential but needs a lot of work. If it came out at the start of the year, it would only have Sports Scramble as competition but now with Match Point Tennis and Tennis League VR having just come out with demos and First Person tennis on the horizon, these are all way more polished games at this point in time.

developer_response.body: Haha, don't worry about it. This will be a very different game from existing ones. This is still early days in VR, there are plenty of rooms for diversified game experiences :)

reviews.review_description:
As a two handed backhand player, found it difficult to execute on the backhand - if the ball can be dropped on the racket hand this would be ideal (I would use one controller to drop the ball and immediately drop the controller to focus both hands on the racket)

An option to allow for the bot to initiate the first ball for return practice

developer_response.body:
Thank you for your candid feedback. 

Please consider join our discord server: https://teletennis.games/discord to learn about newest updates! Love to hear more about your thoughts along the way.

reviews.review_description: I do really think this games can be very good in about 6 months. Yes there are a few issues and I wouldn’t recommend paying for it JUST YET.

developer_response.body: Yes. Please contact us for a key instead of buying it straight out :)

reviews.review_description: Have fun while doing sports, It would be better to show player's hands.
Can't wait for the full release!

developer_response.body:
Thank you for your support, please join our official discord server for the updates :)

https://teletennis.games/discord

reviews.review_description: I quite a lot enjoy this game, love how you being the sport into VR!!!
